calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator). Patricia Baker in Propria Persona.

The Court heard oral argument and took the accounting/petition for final distribution under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes. Patricia Baker in Propria Persona.

The accounting petition was continued to February 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Patricia Baker to file her objections.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Continued To Dec-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes. Patricia Baker in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbostad informed the Court that he just filed the Second Report and Final Account with a hearing date of December 9, 2013. Mr. Melbostad also stated that rents for the 20th Street property continued to be deposited into the estate account after there was an order for preliminary distribution, that he will have to supplement the accounting petition because they are missing information on the source of some of the deposits and that he just obtained more ledgers last night. Ms. Baker expressed concern about the manner in which records were maintained and not having an accounting for a ten year period. The hearing date on the accounting petition was continued to December 10, 2013 at 10:30 a.m. (special set) in Dept. 204 to be heard by Judge Wiss. Mr. Melbostad will provide notice of the December 10, 2013 date. The Court suggested Ms. Baker file her objections at least ten days prior to the hearing date. Today's status hearing was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Sep-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes. Patricia Baker appeared in propria persona.

Mr. Melbostad stated that they pulled all the information together, that they have a detailed ledger from Ms. Baker-Reyes, that they are hopeful that they can fill in the missing information from the BofA statements, and that they should have the petition for final distribution on file in two weeks. Ms. Baker presented her concerns, stated that there's been no accounting in ten years, and that if she asks Mr. Melbostad for information he threatens her with a partition action and/or a restraining order. The matter was continued to September 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the filing of the petition for final distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanne Grove appeared in place of Paul Melbostad for and with Deborah Baker-Reyes. Patricia Baker in Propria Persona.

Ms. Baker stated that she has cashiers checks to purchase the Willits property but that her Sister was unable to provide an accounting. The Court asked Ms. Grove to tell Mr. Melbostad that it does not think there is going to be a waiver of an accounting, and that he will need to file the accounting and a petition for final distribution. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to July 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator). Patricia Baker (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

The parties appeared and represented to the Court that they had reached an agreement with regard to a buy out. During the course of the hearing the parties were in despute with regard to the issue of an accounting being provided. The parties were asked to step out of the court room and discuss the matter to try to reach resolution. Upon returning, the parties attempted to draft a written stipulation but could not agree on Deborah providing Patricia with an accounting. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to June 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on closing of estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Continued To Mar-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with Debraoh Baker-Reyes. Patricia Baker in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbostad stated that there was a delay in completing sale of the Willts property to Patricia, that an appraisal is scheduled on Thursday and one in October, and that his Client is going to sell her distibutive share of the property for an amount based on the two appraisals. Mr. Melbostad also stated that the taxes have been paid. Patricia Baker stated that she wants an accounting on the rents collected from the two properties. Status on the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to March 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Patricia Baker in Pro Per (Beneficiary).

Mr. Melbostad is not present. Ms. Baker reported that the Partition action has concluded and that she wants an accounting. The Court informed her that she will need to petition for an order for accounting and that the 20th Street property is no longer as asset of this estate, it was distributed to the two heirs so time ago. The only issue before the court today is the status on closing the estate. The status on closing the estate was continued to June 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will issue an Order to Appear to Mr. Melbostad.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

At 9:56 a.m., Mr. Melbostad appeared for Deborah Baker-Reyers. Patricia Baker is also present.

Mr. Melbostad reported that her client is willing to sell her share to her sister Patricia Baker and that she is also willing to distribute her share to her sister. The Court vacated the June 26, 2012 hearing and the Order to Appear. The status on closing the estate was continued to September 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Continued To May-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Continued To Jan-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Oct-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator).

Mr. Melbostad stated that the Administrator is going to pay the administration costs of the Estate out of the proceeds from the partition sale. In addition, he stated that they had one open house, that they are going to have two more open houses, that they expect the house to sell in August, that the only asset in the Estate is the partial interest in the Willits property and that they can't get a Real Estate Agent to list and sell it. Furhtermore, he stated that once the administration costs are paid, that they will transfer title of the Willits property to the two Sisters. Status of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to October 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Continued To Jul-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator).

Mr. Melbostad stated that Michael Kasolas (Probate Referee) was appointed and that he was now proceeding with the partition sale of the San Francisco property. Status of filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to July 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Sandberg.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2011 Continued To Apr-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on April 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain his absence and status on closing of the estate. The matter was also continued to April 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Continued To Mar-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator).

Mr. Melbostad stated that the reason he could not file the petition for final distribution was because the property in Willits could not be sold, that the property had been damaged by the previous renters and that the Administrator was in the process of painting/repairing the property. The matter was continued to March 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Continued To Sep-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Deborah Baker-Reyes.

Mr. Melbostad stated that the Petition for Final Distribution had not been filed because the Estate does not have sufficient cash to pay Adminisrtation expenses, that they are having to sell the house, that his Client spoke to two Agents and that she was waiting to hear back from them. In addition, he stated that it may be difficult to sell the house because the Estate owns 6/8 interest, that his Client owns 1/8 interest which she is willing to sell but that his Client's Sister was not willing to sell her share, and that there are tenants living in the home without paying rent. The Court stated that they would have to file a partition action. The matter was continued to September 7, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Vacate Order For Preliminary Distribution, For Order To Sell Real Properties, And For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with Deborah Baker-Reyes (Administrator/Petitioner). Patricia Baker (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbostad stated that title of the property was held by both Parties as Tenants in Common, referred to the distribution order and stated that neither one of the Sisters could qualify for their own home loan. Both Parties expressed their concerns and provided case history for the Court. The Court stated that the two alternatives were that they could agree to sell the house or file a partition action. The matter was taken under submission. Status of closing of the Estate was set for May 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
